Reason_for_Visit.summary: The patient is a 56 y.o. female with history ADH, now with right breast Grade II micropapillary mucinous carcinoma, ER+ (>95%), PR+ (80%), HER2 equiv by IHC (2) neg by FISH, 5%. She is s/p partial mastectomy with excision and axillary dissection and is here to discuss systemic therapy options.

Cancer_Diagnosis.Type_of_Cancer: Grade II micropapillary mucinous carcinoma, ER+/PR+/HER2-

Clinical_Findings.findings: Right breast: 6.4cm irregularly shaped masses with obscured margins and associated fine pleomorphic calcifications. New right axillary LN with irregular morphology. Ultrasound showed multiple solid hypoechoic irregular vascular masses, together measuring 50 x 21 x 55mm extending from 9:00 3cm from nipple to 9:00 7cm from nipple. Abnormal right axillary LN at 11:00, 15cm from nipple with focal cortical thickening up to 6mm. Liver: hypervascular mass in segment 8 measuring 1.9 cm with a hemangioma demonstrating discontinuous nodular enhancement with gradual fill in, several scattered subcentimeter hypervascular foci throughout the liver, could be due to flash filling. Additionally, there is a hypervascular mass in segment 6 measuring 3.5 cm which is mildly hypervascular demonstrating more homogeneous enhancement. This most likely represents a focal nodular hyperplasia. No definite sites of hypermetabolic metastatic disease.

Current_Medications.current_meds: acetaminophen (TYLENOL) 500 mg tablet, acetaminophen-codeine (TYLENOL #4) 300-60 mg tablet, calcium carbonate (Tums) 1250 mg (500 mg elemental) tablet, cetirizine (ZYRTEC) 10 mg tablet, cholecalciferol, vitamin D3, 1,000 unit CAP, cyclobenzaprine (FLEXERIL) 5 mg tablet, diclofenac (VOLTAREN) 1 % GEL gel, docusate sodium (COLACE) 100 mg capsule, Duloxetine (CYMBALTA) 60 mg DR, gabapentin (NEURONTIN) 400 mg capsule, ibuprofen (ADVIL,MOTRIN) 600 mg tablet, losartan-hydrochlorothiazide (HYZAAR) 50-12.5 mg tablet, meloxicam (MOBIC) 15 mg tablet, naloxone 4 mg/actuation SPRAYNAERO, nicotine (NICODERM CQ) 21 mg/24 hr patch, omeprazole (PRILOSEC) 20 mg capsule, oxyCODONE (ROXICODONE) 5 mg tablet, senna (SENOKOT) 8.6 mg tablet

Treatment_Goals.response_assessment: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.
